info.english_meaning: to go to count to enumerate
info.DAturUpanandinIwippaRI: adantaH  ' kaleH kAlayati kzepe gatisaNKyAnayordvayoH  kalayed SabdasaNKyAnavizaye kalate Sapi ' (Slo. 155) iti devaH

upasarga_meanings.meaning: sArAMSa nikAla kara kahanA tAtparya kahanA saMkalana karanA milAnA

upasargachandrika.example_text: 'tarucCidraprotAn (SaSinaH karAn) bisamiti karI saNkalayati' (suBA॰) saNkalayati=gfhRAti jAnAti
'pattIn sarvAn atibalAn yotsyamAnAnavasTitAn ekaH saNkAlayizyAmi vajrapARirivAsurAn' (BA॰vi॰61.30).. vidrAvayizyAmItyAha
'saNkalayati kAlayati vA BUtAnIti kAlaH' (suSrute sUtra॰6.2) saNkalayati=saNgfhRAti
'na tu saNkAlanaM rAjYo vinA putreRa mantriRaH' (rA॰2.66.15) saNkAlanaM pretanirhAram
'Srayati sOKyamamuM janatA SritA vikalitA kalitApaSatErapi' (pArijAta0 1025) vikalitA'BiBUtA asamarTIkftA vyAkulA kzuBitA
'aTa saMkalitavyavakalitayoH karaRasUtraM vfttArDam' iti lIlA0 vyavakalitaM hInIkftam
'yadi vyakte yuktivyavakalanamArge'si kuSalA' (lIlA0 13) vyavakalanaM SoDanaM nyUnIkaraRam
'IzadAkalitaM cApi kroDAd drutapadaM sTitam' (BA0 vi0 2365) AkalitaM vepamAnam
'tataH paScAdAyAntaM BayahetumAkalayya manTaro jalaM pravizwaH' (hitopa0) Akalayya dfzwvA avabuDya
'svaM dvIpaM saptavarzARi viBajya saptavarzanAmaBya AtmajeBya Akalayya' (BA0 pu0 5202) Akalayya saMkramayya samarpya
'prAcetasAdyAH kavayo'navadyA yadekadeSAkalane'pi neSAH' (viSva0 ca0 549) Akalane kArtsnyena saNKyAne upavarRane
'yajYe yajYe yaTAkAlaM dakziRA atyakAlayat' (BA0 droRa0 575) atyakAlayat=adadAt apodaharaditi SabdArTaH

'gAva utkAlitapuMskA bAhAya ca vikrayAya ca striya evAvaSizyante kaH punararhatyagrAmyARAM puMsa utkAlayituM ye grahItumaSakyAH kuta eva bAhAya ca vikrayAya ca' (pA0 1273 sUtre BAzyam) utkAlitapuMskAH=nizkAsitapumBAvAH
'strIlokaH parikalayAYcakAra tulyaM palyaNkErvigalitahAracAruBiH svEH' (SiSu0 89) parikalayAYcakAra mene jagrAha
